motivation_low_framing.fallback: Low energy works better in short bursts. Let's do 5 minutes and see.

blocker_pattern.fallback: That blocker came up again — worth making a note of it.

ui_labels.mic_access_settings: Enable in Settings to use this app.
ui_labels.onboarding_subtitle:
25-minute focused work sessions.
Voice-first. No interruptions. All local.
ui_labels.onboarding_download_hint: Requires a one-time download of ~820 MB
ui_labels.onboarding_models_info:
Speech recognition (~216 MB) and voice synthesis (~600 MB).
Models run entirely on your device.
ui_labels.onboarding_setup_hint:
This takes a few minutes on first launch.
Models are cached — future launches are fast.
ui_labels.onboarding_name_hint: Used only for the closing sentence at session end.
ui_labels.onboarding_change_name_hint: You can always change your name in Settings.
ui_labels.error_models_unavailable: Audio models are still unavailable. Please try again.
